detail: products table created with policy 'Products are publicly readable' → anon SELECT worked
2 anonymous paid orders (c8888426, 50332a97) — proves anon checkout functioned that day
Zero anonymous paid orders across 148 days despite active site
Single paid order in May (user-attributed, not anon)
ALTER VIEW products_public SET (security_invoker=true) WITHOUT adding anon RLS on products → storefront returns 0 rows for anon
Anonymous PostgREST queries returned 0 products for ~76h. Admin/service role continued to see all products, masking the incident.
Flipped view to security_invoker=off + GRANT SELECT anon,authenticated. Anon returns 342 products.
Restored security_invoker=on + narrow anon RLS policy on products (is_active, in-stock, listable). Anon still returns 342.
